formula: ev-im · ev-in · ev-i · ev-imiz · ev-iniz · ev-leri

body.md: Possession is marked on the **possessed noun**. The bracketed vowel appears only after a consonant: *ev-im* but *araba-m*; 3rd person adds **-s-** after a vowel: *ev-i* but *araba-sı*.
Order of stacking: plural first, then possessive: *göz-ler-im* (my eyes). Note *evleri* can mean ‘their house’ or ‘his houses’ — context decides.
